name: Achraf JAANINE
title: AI Engineer
summary: AI Engineer specialized in generative AI, RAG systems, and computer vision, with experience in real, constrained business environments (insurance). Designs end-to-end ML systems across the full lifecycle: data construction, fine-tuning, RAG pipeline design, rigorous offline evaluation (RAGAS), and cloud deployment on AWS.

mlops_cloud: AWS (S3, EC2, ECS, Fargate, Lambda, ECR, SageMaker, IAM)

highlights: RAG platform assisting responses to French public procurement tenders from internal docs and buyer files (Excel, Word, scanned PDF, images).
Document AI pipeline: text/structure extraction (OCR / MinerU / Docling), indexed in Qdrant coupled with a knowledge graph.
Rigorous evaluation: 223 Q/A test set, RAGAS metrics (faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision/recall) and latency tracking.
Industrialization: uv, mypy, Docker, GitHub Actions CI (code, types, tests, model quality), pinned deps.
Model-provider-agnostic architecture (interchangeable LLM/embeddings via OpenRouter), FastAPI + Gradio.
Automatic dental quote extraction system to estimate out-of-pocket cost, working with business teams on reimbursement rules and quote-format diversity.
End-to-end sequential Document AI pipeline: table detection (YOLO), orientation correction, OCR (EasyOCR, PaddleOCR), layout understanding (LayoutLM), structured extraction.
Dataset built via synthetic data generation (OpenAI API, Faker, ReportLab, HTML) and active-learning annotation (Label Studio).

End-to-end fine-tuning (PyTorch, Hugging Face) on internal data, orchestrated in Dataiku, artifacts on AWS S3. Functional prototype validated on real internal data and presented to business and technical teams.
Few-shot/one-shot model (Siamese Networks, PyTorch) for industrial part recognition.
End-to-end app with Django REST API and Vue.js front, Dockerized, CI on GitHub Actions.
Interactive VR environment for pediatric dental anatomy training (Unity, C#).
LLM-generated Q/A for the exam module, connected to Moodle.

projects.name: Multimodal RAG Assistant
projects.description: RAG assistant over heterogeneous course material (text, tables, images) with Gemini, LangChain, Qdrant, FastAPI, Docker, Chainlit. Deployed on AWS: containerized services on ECS Fargate (ECR images, IAM roles), ingestion via Lambda, CI/CD on GitHub Actions.

projects.name: GrooveMind
projects.description: Two-stage music recommendation (retrieval + reranking) on CLAP embeddings and FAISS with custom reranker. A/B vs vector-only baseline. Containerized FastAPI service.

education: M2 Machine Learning for Data Science — Université Paris Cité (2024-2025)
Engineering Degree in AI & Data Science — ENSAM Meknès (2019-2024)
certifications: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (in progress)
